module.name: execution
module.purpose: Per-execution host runtime for the executor module. execution.rs defines ExecutionRuntime, the host-side runtime of an agent Execution that holds an Arc<ExecutionContext>, its execution_tx SessionEvent sender, and a worker JoinHandle; new builds the execution channel and shared ExecutionContext and immediately spawns the worker (there is no separate run), while sender clones the execution_tx. The private impl emits ExecutionStatus::Started, spawns the tool execution, and loops execution_rx handling Cancel->Canceled and Kill->Killed; the execution reads raw tool input from parameters.input.content on the typed ExecutionRequest, runs tool.execute, emits an ExecutionUpdate plus ExecutionStatus::Succeed, and forwards SessionEvent::Execution values stamped with parameters.signature by synchronously locking agent_tx, packaging each event into a SessionMessage via HostSession::package_message (send_event), and calling try_send. execution_context.rs defines ExecutionContext, holding the host-local Tool handle, the ExecutionRequest (signature plus typed input), and the shared agent SessionMessage sender. mod.rs is re-export wiring only.
